_comment: Targets train/val-good but test-poor: validation is question-held-out from the same TSV (still similar to train); test.tsv is a different split/distribution. Recipe: keep long graph context (384), slow the fine-tune (lower lr), regularize (AdamW weight_decay + higher dropout + grad clip), freeze lower MPNet blocks so the encoder does not overfit train/val idiosyncrasies. Best checkpoint is still chosen by val F1.
